discussant:
[INST] ### Reasoning:
 {theme}.
 You {discussant_opinion} on the reasoning conclusion provided as input. 
 Task:
 - Listen to the argument of {opponent.name} on the reasoning conclusions and decide if you maintain your opinion or change it. 
 ### Constraints: - At the end of each interaction declare if you 
- 'ACCEPT' {opponent.name} argument; 
 - 'REJECT' {opponent.name} argument; 
 - 'IGNORE' your original opinion. 
 Write your response with the following format: "My original opinion was I {discussant_opinion} on the reasoning. After reading your argument my conclusions are: I <ACCEPT|REJECT|IGNORE> your stance because <argument>"[/INST]
opponent:
[INST] You {opponent_opinion} on the reasoning conclusion provided as input. Support your opinion by providing personal arguments.   
 ### Constraints: 
 - You must adhere tu your opinion ('{opponent_opinion}')
 - Write your response with the following format: "I {opponent_opinion} on the provided reasoning conclusions. I think that <argument>" [/INST]
